2026-03-29T20:53:00.CONTENT_EN:
As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, the following High Speed Rail train trip has been cancelled due to adverse weather conditions:

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shantou Station：G6398

For ticket refunds, please refer to the High Speed Rail website and process within the time stated. Please use the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app.   
For updated train schedules, please refer to the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station or call the High Speed Rail Ticketing and Customer Service Hotline on (852) 2120 0888 or visit the High Speed Rail website www. mtr. com. hk/highspeed.
2026-03-29T20:53:00.CONTENT_CN:
中國內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣情況惡劣，下列高速鐵路列車車次取消：

由香港西九龍站前往汕頭站：G6398

如需退票，請參閱高速鐵路網頁並於指定日期內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式。  
有關班次的資料，請留意於香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊，亦可致電高速鐵路購票及客務熱綫(852)2120 0888查詢或瀏覽高速鐵路網站www.mtr.com.hk/highspeed。

2026-03-30T10:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2026-03-30T10:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

2026-03-30T13:15:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, some train trips will be delayed due to adverse weather conditions. For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or the mobile app. You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2026-03-30T13:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 中國內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣情況惡劣，部分列車服務將會延遲。 有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，或手機應用程式。乘客亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

2026-03-30T16:27:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, some train trips will be delayed due to adverse weather conditions. For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or the mobile app. You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2026-03-30T16:27:00.CONTENT_CN: 中國內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣情況惡劣，部分列車服務將會延遲。 有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，或手機應用程式。乘客亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 機場管理局 早上繁忙時段

2026-04-01T06:09:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to heavy traffic at the road section leading from Airport Road to Hong Kong International Airport’s Terminal 1 Departures Kerb, motorists are advised to use the drop-off area at the Airport’s Car Park 1. Members of the public heading to the Airport are advised to allow sufficient time for their journey and consider taking the Airport Express and buses.
2026-04-01T06:09:00.CONTENT_CN: 現時機場路通往香港國際機場一號客運大樓離港層落客區的路段交通繁忙，駕駛人士請考慮改用機場一號停車場落客區。前往機場的市民，請預留足夠交通時間，並考慮乘搭機場快綫或巴士。

2026-04-01T12:56:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the holding of the 2026-2027 Hong Kong Road Cycling Race on 5 April 2026 (Sunday), temporary road closures will be implemented at Ngo Shan Road, Sai Kung: - The section of Fei Ngo Shan Road from its junction with the access road to Fei Ngo Shan Road house number 19 to a point about 3 kilometres north of the same junction will be temporarily closed from 6.00 am to 11.00 am. During the road closure period of Ngo Shan Road, Sai Kung (i. e. from 6.00 am to 11.00 am on 5 April 2026), all vehicular traffic (except emergency vehicles) will be prohibited to enter Ngo Shan Road, Sai Kung, until the reopening of the road. Appropriate traffic signs will be erected on site to guide motorists. Other temporary road and traffic control measures, including adjusting the extent of road closures, may be implemented by the Police at short notice depending on the actual traffic conditions. The TD appeals to the public to pay attention to the temporary road closures. Members of the public who plan to go to the affected areas should plan their journey in advance, allow sufficient travelling time to avoid unexpected delay. Motorists and public should exercise patience and follow the instructions of the Police on-site.
2026-04-01T12:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 為配合2026年4月5日(星期日)舉行的2026-2027全港公路單車賽，當局將於活動期間在西貢飛鵝山道實施以下臨時封路安排： -飛鵝山道由其與通往飛鵝山道門牌19號的通道交界處起至同一交界以北約3公里處止的路段將上午6時至上午11時臨時封閉。 西貢飛鵝山道封路期間（即2026年4月5日上午6時至上午11時），所有車輛（緊急車輛除外）不能進入西貢飛鵝山道，直至道路重開為止。有關地點將設置適當的交通標誌，指導駕駛人士。 警方會視乎現場實際路面情況而在短時間內實施其他臨時道路及交通管制措施，包括調整封路範圍。運輸署呼籲市民留意臨時封路安排並應及早計劃行程及預留額外的時間以免延誤。駕駛及公眾人士請保持忍讓，並遵從在場警務人員的指示。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) runs additional temporary train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車車次

2026-04-01T14:42:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station: - 5 Apr: G9540 - 6 Apr: G9538 - 7 Apr: G9536, G9544 From Shenzhenbei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: - 3 Apr: G9535, G9537, G9539, G9543 From Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: - 3 Apr: G9541 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station: - 7 Apr: G9542 Ticketing Methods: - 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app - Appointed travel agents - Hong Kong West Kowloon Station • Self-service Ticket Machines: bring valid and original travel documents of all passengers; only e-payment methods are accepted (for example, contactless credit cards, WeChat Pay or Alipay) • Ticketing Counters: may require a longer waiting time Train schedules: - 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app
2026-04-01T14:42:00.CONTENT_CN: 中國內地鐵路部門通知，高速鐵路（香港段）將加開以下臨時列車車次： 由香港西九龍站前往深圳北站： -4月5日：G9540 -4月6日：G9538 -4月7日：G9536,G9544 由深圳北站前往香港西九龍站： -4月3日：G9535,G9537,G9539,G9543 由廣州南站前往香港西九龍站： -4月3日：G9541 由香港西九龍站前往廣州南站： -4月7日：G9542 購票方式： -12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式 -指定代理 -前往香港西九龍站 •使用自助售票機：需帶備所有乘車人士的有效旅遊證件正本；只接受電子支付（如感應式信用卡、微信支付或支付寶） •使用票務櫃位：可能需要輪候較長時間 列車服務詳情： -12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式
